# Matrix structure

**Data field**

A matrix structure associated with this text media.

## Overview

This should be the identity matrix. A matrix shows how to map points from one coordinate space into another. See [doc://com.apple.qtff/documentation/QuickTime-File-Format/Matrices] for a discussion of how display matrices are used in QuickTime and see [doc://com.apple.qtff/documentation/quicktime-file-format/Movie_header_atom/Matrix_structure] for an illustration of a matrix structure within an atom.

## Data fields

- **Size**: A 32-bit integer that specifies the number of bytes in this text media information atom.
- **Type**: A 32-bit integer that identifies the atom type.
